hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.vue) pnpm eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *apps/docs*) for d in packages/shared packages/sandbox packages/puppeteer; do [ ! -d "$d/dist" ] && echo "WARNING: $d/dist missing" && exit 2; done ;; esac; true
